name: figma-editor
title: Figma-style Design Editor
description: Editable Figma DESKTOP APP editor rebuilt against a real logged-in Figma.app capture (reference/figma/2026-07-13/desktop-app-editor): Mac tab strip with traffic lights + file tabs, UI3 icon rail (File/Agents/Assets/Tools/Variables), attached side panels, dark canvas, floating bottom toolbar. Design handoff, frame editing, selection-handle, and Claude-to-design workflow scenes. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.
